sentences.arabic: وَصَلَ فَاتُورَةُ الكَهْرَبَاءِ إِلَى البَيْتِ هَذَا الشَّهْرَ.
sentences.translation: Ovog mjeseca stigao je račun za struju kući.
sentences.translationEn: The electricity bill arrived at home this month.

sentences.arabic: نَظَرَ الأَبُ فِي المَبْلَغِ وَقَالَ إِنَّهُ كَبِيرٌ.
sentences.translation: Otac je pogledao iznos i rekao da je velik.
sentences.translationEn: The father looked at the amount and said it was large.

sentences.arabic: طَلَبَ مِنَ الأُسْرَةِ أَنْ تَتَوَفَّرَ فِي اسْتِخْدَامِ الكَهْرَبَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Zamolio je porodicu da štedi struju.
sentences.translationEn: He asked the family to be careful with electricity use.

sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَ إِلَى مَكْتَبِ الدَّفْعِ وَسَدَّدَ الفَاتُورَةَ.
sentences.translation: Otišao je u uplatnicu i platio račun.
sentences.translationEn: He went to the payment office and settled the bill.

sentences.arabic: فِي الشَّهْرِ التَّالِي كَانَ المَبْلَغُ أَقَلَّ.
sentences.translation: Sljedećeg mjeseca iznos je bio manji.
sentences.translationEn: The following month the amount was less.
